summary.key_theme: 市場對 Cisco 在 AI 與資料中心領域的成長潛力持樂觀態度，儘管面臨安全業務營收下滑與短期股價波動的挑戰。

bullish.title: Cisco (CSCO) Rated Buy on Strong AI and Data Center Demand
bullish.reason: BofA Securities 給予買進評級，主要看好 AI 與資料中心需求強勁，顯示機構投資人對其核心業務轉型具備信心。

bullish.title: How Cisco Systems (CSCO) Story Is Shifting With Margin Pressures And Higher Valuation Hopes
bullish.reason: 分析師調升目標價約數美元，反映市場對於 Cisco 在利潤壓力下仍能維持估值擴張的預期。

bullish.title: Cisco Reimagines Security for the Agentic Workforce
bullish.reason: Cisco 於 RSA 大會宣布針對 AI 代理工作負載的創新安全工具，旨在透過技術升級重振安全業務成長。

bullish.title: Cisco Systems (CSCO) Laps the Stock Market: Here's Why
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，反映市場對其近期營運表現的正面認可。

bullish.title: A Look At Cisco (CSCO) Valuation As Shares Trade Below Estimated Fair Value
bullish.reason: 股價交易價格低於估計公允價值，吸引價值型投資人關注。

bullish.title: Cisco Systems Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
bullish.reason: 在強勁的交易日中表現優於競爭對手，顯示短期買盤動能充足。

bearish.title: Why Cisco (CSCO) Stock Is Down Today
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.8%，反映市場對整體大盤走勢的反應以及對其短期營收壓力的擔憂。

bearish.title: Cisco Bets on New Portfolio to Reignite Security Growth: What's Ahead?
bearish.reason: 儘管有新產品推出，但安全業務面臨 4% 的營收下滑與成本上升壓力，顯示轉型過程仍具挑戰。

neutral.title: Is Kingsoft Cloud (KC) Stock Outpacing Its Computer and Technology Peers This Year?
neutral.reason: 僅為同業績效比較，未對 Cisco 本身基本面產生直接影響。

neutral.title: Cisco Expands AI Agentic Security Portfolio: Will the Tech Deliver?
neutral.reason: 針對新產品的市場觀察，持保留態度，關注技術是否能轉化為實際營收。

neutral.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為投資人關注度報告，未提供具體利多或利空訊息。
